로마서 9:1.content: I tell the truth in Christ. I am not lying, my conscience testifying with me in the Holy Spirit

로마서 9:2.content: that I have great sorrow and unceasing pain in my heart.

로마서 9:3.content: For I could wish that I myself were accursed from Christ for my brothers’ sake, my relatives according to the flesh

로마서 9:4.content: who are Israelites; whose is the adoption, the glory, the covenants, the giving of the law, the service, and the promises;

로마서 9:5.content: of whom are the fathers, and from whom is Christ as concerning the flesh, who is over all, God, blessed forever. Amen.

로마서 9:6.content: But it is not as though the word of God has come to nothing. For they are not all Israel that are of Israel.

로마서 9:7.content: Neither, because they are Abraham’s offspring, are they all children. But, “your offspring will be accounted as from Isaac.”

로마서 9:8.content: That is, it is not the children of the flesh who are children of God, but the children of the promise are counted as heirs.

로마서 9:9.content: For this is a word of promise, “At the appointed time I will come, and Sarah will have a son.”

로마서 9:10.content: Not only so, but Rebekah also conceived by one, by our father Isaac.

로마서 9:11.content: For being not yet born, neither having done anything good or bad, that the purpose of God according to election might stand, not of works, but of him who calls,

로마서 9:12.content: it was said to her, “The elder will serve the younger.”

로마서 9:13.content: Even as it is written, “Jacob I loved, but Esau I hated.”

로마서 9:14.content: What shall we say then? Is there unrighteousness with God? May it never be!

로마서 9:15.content: For he said to Moses, “I will have mercy on whom I have mercy, and I will have compassion on whom I have compassion.”

로마서 9:16.content: So then it is not of him who wills, nor of him who runs, but of God who has mercy.

로마서 9:17.content: For the Scripture says to Pharaoh, “For this very purpose I caused you to be raised up, that I might show in you my power, and that my name might be proclaimed in all the earth.”

로마서 9:18.content: So then, he has mercy on whom he desires, and he hardens whom he desires.

로마서 9:19.content: You will say then to me, “Why does he still find fault? For who withstands his will?”

로마서 9:20.content: But indeed, O man, who are you to reply against God? Will the thing formed ask him who formed it, “Why did you make me like this?”

로마서 9:21.content: Or hasn’t the potter a right over the clay, from the same lump to make one part a vessel for honor, and another for dishonor?

로마서 9:22.content: What if God, willing to show his wrath and to make his power known, endured with much patience vessels of wrath prepared for destruction,

로마서 9:23.content: and that he might make known the riches of his glory on vessels of mercy, which he prepared beforehand for glory,

로마서 9:24.content: us, whom he also called, not from the Jews only, but also from the Gentiles?

로마서 9:25.content: As he says also in Hosea, “I will call them ‘my people,’ which were not my people; and her ‘beloved,’ who was not beloved.”

로마서 9:26.content: “It will be that in the place where it was said to them, ‘You are not my people,’ there they will be called ‘children of the living God.’ ”

로마서 9:27.content: Isaiah cries concerning Israel, “If the number of the children of Israel are as the sand of the sea, it is the remnant who will be saved;

로마서 9:28.content: for He will finish the work and cut it short in righteousness, because the LORD will make a short work upon the earth.”

로마서 9:29.content: As Isaiah has said before, “Unless the Lord of Armies had left us a seed, we would have become like Sodom, and would have been made like Gomorrah.”

로마서 9:30.content: What shall we say then? That the Gentiles, who didn’t follow after righteousness, attained to righteousness, even the righteousness which is of faith;

로마서 9:31.content: but Israel, following after a law of righteousness, didn’t arrive at the law of righteousness.

로마서 9:32.content: Why? Because they didn’t seek it by faith, but as it were by works of the law. They stumbled over the stumbling stone;

로마서 9:33.content: even as it is written, “Behold, I lay in Zion a stumbling stone and a rock of offense; and no one who believes in him will be disappointed.”
